---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Invoice — Voyara"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    css: assets/css/extra.css
    theme: [cosmo, assets/css/voyara.scss]
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
          <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
          <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Fraunces:opsz,wght@9..144,400;9..144,600;9..144,700&family=Outfit:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
          <style>
            body { background: #fbf7f1; }
            .bill-container {
              max-width: 850px;
              margin: 3rem auto;
              background: #fff;
              padding: 4rem;
              border-radius: 24px;
              box-shadow: 0 40px 100px -30px rgba(18,42,46,0.12);
              position: relative;
              overflow: hidden;
              border: 1px solid rgba(18,42,46,0.06);
            }
            .bill-header {
              display: flex;
              justify-content: space-between;
              align-items: flex-start;
              margin-bottom: 4rem;
              border-bottom: 2px solid var(--voyara-sand);
              padding-bottom: 2rem;
            }
            .letterhead-logo {
              height: 42px;
              margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
            }
            .bill-meta {
              text-align: right;
            }
            .bill-meta h1 {
              color: var(--voyara-teal);
              font-size: 2.8rem;
              margin: 0 0 0.5rem;
            }
            .meta-grid {
              display: flex;
              flex-direction: column;
              gap: 0.4rem;
              align-items: flex-end;
              font-family: "Outfit", sans-serif;
              font-size: 0.95rem;
              white-space: nowrap;
            }
            .meta-item {
              display: flex;
              justify-content: flex-end;
              gap: 0.8rem;
              text-align: right;
            }
            .meta-label { font-weight: 600; color: var(--voyara-terra-dk); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; font-size: 0.8rem; align-self: center; }
            .address-box {
              display: grid;
              grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
              gap: 3rem;
              margin-bottom: 4rem;
            }
            .address-label {
              font-family: "Outfit", sans-serif;
              font-weight: 600;
              text-transform: uppercase;
              letter-spacing: 0.1em;
              font-size: 0.75rem;
              color: var(--voyara-terra-dk);
              margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
            }
            .address-text {
              font-size: 1.05rem;
              line-height: 1.5;
              color: var(--voyara-ink);
            }
            .bill-table {
              width: 100%;
              border-collapse: collapse;
              margin-bottom: 3rem;
            }
            .bill-table th {
              background: var(--voyara-sand);
              padding: 1rem;
              text-align: left;
              font-family: "Outfit", sans-serif;
              font-weight: 600;
              text-transform: uppercase;
              letter-spacing: 0.05em;
              font-size: 0.85rem;
            }
            .bill-table td {
              padding: 1.2rem 1rem;
              border-bottom: 1px solid var(--voyara-sand);
            }
            .bill-table tr:last-child td { border-bottom: none; }
            .total-section {
              margin-left: auto;
              width: 300px;
              display: grid;
              grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
              gap: 1rem;
              align-items: center;
              padding-top: 1rem;
              border-top: 2px solid var(--voyara-ink);
            }
            .total-label { font-family: "Outfit", sans-serif; font-weight: 600; }
            .total-value { font-family: "Fraunces", serif; font-size: 1.4rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--voyara-teal); text-align: right; }
            
            .electronic-stamp {
              position: absolute;
              bottom: 4rem;
              right: 4rem;
              width: 160px;
              height: 160px;
              border: 3px double var(--voyara-terra);
              border-radius: 50%;
              display: flex;
              flex-direction: column;
              align-items: center;
              justify-content: center;
              transform: rotate(-15deg);
              opacity: 0.8;
              user-select: none;
              background: rgba(226, 115, 74, 0.03);
            }
            .stamp-inner {
              text-align: center;
              color: var(--voyara-terra-dk);
              font-family: "Outfit", sans-serif;
              line-height: 1.2;
            }
            .stamp-org { font-weight: 800; font-size: 0.9rem; margin-bottom: 0.2rem; }
            .stamp-status { font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; }
            .stamp-date { font-size: 0.6rem; margin-top: 0.4rem; font-style: italic; }

            .bill-footer {
              margin-top: 6rem;
              padding-top: 2rem;
              border-top: 1px solid var(--voyara-sand);
              font-size: 0.85rem;
              color: rgba(18,42,46,0.6);
              display: grid;
              grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr;
              gap: 2rem;
            }
            
            @media print {
              body { background: #fff; }
              .bill-container { box-shadow: none; margin: 0; border: none; padding: 0; }
              .btn-print { display: none; }
            }
            
            .btn-print {
              position: fixed;
              bottom: 2rem;
              right: 2rem;
              z-index: 100;
            }
          </style>
params:
  invoice_no: "VY-2026-06-001"
  date: "June 06, 2026"
  billed_to_name: "Mr. Vishu"
  billed_to_address: ""
  currency: "USD"
  payment_method: "CASH"
---

```{r}
#| include: false
# Triggers Knitr engine
```

::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: bill-container
::::::::::: bill-header
:::: bill-brand
<img src="assets/img/logo.svg" class="letterhead-logo"/>

::: {.address-text style="font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.9rem;"}
**Voyara Travel & Education Services**<br> Ringstrasse, 8107 Switzerland<br> voyarahq\@gmail.com<br> https://voyarahq.github.io/voyara/<br> +1 (909) 906-0020 (USA)<br> +91 80590 65971 (IND)<br> +41 78 202 98 86 (CHE)<br> +256 708 599319 (UGA)
:::
::::

:::::::: bill-meta
# INVOICE

::::::: meta-grid
::: meta-item
[Invoice No:]{.meta-label} `r params$invoice_no`
:::

::: meta-item
[Date:]{.meta-label} `r params$date`
:::

::: meta-item
[Currency:]{.meta-label} `r params$currency`
:::

::: meta-item
[Payment:]{.meta-label} `r params$payment_method`
:::
:::::::
::::::::
:::::::::::

::::::: address-box
:::: bill-to
[Billed to]{.address-label}

::: address-text
**`r params$billed_to_name`**<br> `r params$billed_to_address`
:::
::::

:::: payment-to
[Payment info]{.address-label}

::: address-text
**Payable to Ms. Divya Kundra**<br> Method: `r params$payment_method`<br> *Payment received in full.*
:::
::::
:::::::

| Description                                  | Qty |  Price |  Total |
|----------------------------------------------|:---:|-------:|-------:|
| Flight ticket of Mr. Vishu (Rounded)         |  1  | 580.00 | 580.00 |
| Flight ticket of Mrs. Amarjit Kaur (Rounded) |  1  | 580.00 | 580.00 |
| 72 hours Dummy ticket for Mrs. Amarjit Kaur  |  1  |   0.00 |   0.00 |
| Commission                                   | \-  |   0.00 |   0.00 |

:::::: total-section
[Subtotal]{.total-label}

::: total-value
`r params$currency` 1,160.00
:::

[VAT (0%)]{.total-label}

::: total-value
0.00
:::

[Amount Due]{.total-label}

::: {.total-value style="color: var(--voyara-terra);"}
`r params$currency` 1,160.00
:::
::::::

::::: bill-footer
::: {}
**Terms & Conditions**<br> Payment to be made in cash directly to Ms. Divya Kundra. All tickets are subject to airline terms and conditions. Thank you for booking with Voyara.
:::

::: {style="text-align: right;"}
**Questions?**<br> voyarahq\@gmail.com
:::
:::::

::::::: electronic-stamp
:::::: stamp-inner
::: stamp-org
VOYARA
:::

::: stamp-status
APPROVED &<br>RELEASED
:::

::: stamp-date
`r format(Sys.Date(), "%d %b %Y")`
:::
::::::
:::::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::

<button class="btn-voyara btn-voyara-primary btn-print" onclick="window.print();">

Print / Save as PDF

</button>
